label: Confuses graph and table
description: Student thinks a knowledge graph is only a table-like database.

label: Incorrect dot product computation
description: Student multiplies vector components but forgets to sum them.

label: Confuses neuron and weight
description: Student confuses the role of neurons and weights.

label: Confuses backpropagation and gradient descent
description: Student thinks backpropagation and gradient descent are exactly the same algorithm.

label: Thinks LLM stores facts exactly
description: Student believes an LLM simply retrieves exact stored facts instead of generating likely text.

label: Confuses RAG with fine-tuning
description: Student thinks retrieval-augmented generation is the same as retraining the model.
